originalTitle: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
title: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
content: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.

originalTitle: Ghana to face Ivory Coast in Afcon 2027 qualifying
title: Ghana to face Ivory Coast in Afcon 2027 qualifying
content: Ghana will face fellow West African heavyweights Ivory Coast in qualifying for the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations, which will be co-hosted by Kenya, Tanzania and Uganda.

title: Kenya suspends strike after transport paralysis over high fuel prices
content: The government and transport operators are in talks to resolve the dispute over the hike in fuel prices.

content: US president also says he could again strike Iran if progress on ceasefire is not made within 'days'.

originalTitle: I knew Amin Abdullah, the hero of the San Diego mosque shooting
title: I knew Amin Abdullah, the hero of the San Diego mosque shooting
content: It doesn't surprise me at all that he gave his life saving the lives of others. He was a true American Muslim.

title: How the shape of a map can determine the US midterm elections
